narrative:
West Chester Twp 30 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,118 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.1 percentage points.
